creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text:
suddenly https://mastodon.nk.ca errors out under 4.2.6

error log shows 
2024/02/15 09:38:30 [error] 53658#101035: *33 kevent() reported that connect() failed (61: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 204.209.81.3, server: mastodon.nk.ca, request: "GET /api/v1/announcements HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/announcements", host: "mastodon.nk.ca", referrer: "https://mastodon.nk.ca/search"
2024/02/15 09:38:32 [error] 53658#101035: *33 kevent() reported that connect() failed (61: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 204.209.81.3, server: mastodon.nk.ca, request: "GET /api/v1/timelines/home HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/timelines/home", host: "mastodon.nk.ca", referrer: "https://mastodon.nk.ca/public/local"
2024/02/15 09:38:32 [error] 53658#101035: *33 kevent() reported that connect() failed (61: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 204.209.81.3, server: mastodon.nk.ca, request: "GET /api/v1/notifications?exclude_types[]=follow_request HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/notifications?exclude_types[]=follow_request", host: "mastodon.nk.ca", referrer: "https://mastodon.nk.ca/public/local"
2024/02/15 09:38:32 [error] 53658#101035: *33 kevent() reported that connect() failed (61: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 204.209.81.3, server: mastodon.nk.ca, request: "GET /api/v1/announcements HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/announcements", host: "mastodon.nk.ca", referrer: "https://mastodon.nk.ca/public/local"
